description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: An Atlas Edit Proposal can be blocked by the Core Facilitator for misalignment. Unanimity among the Core Facilitators is not required to block an AEP for misalignment.
Where an AEP has been blocked for misalignment, the Core Facilitator must update the AEP status as "Rejected-Misaligned".
Each Core Facilitator should issue a written advisory opinion containing their findings/reasoning either supporting or rejecting the blocking of the AEP.
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.
